rules: All UTM values are lowercase, use hyphens as separators (never underscores or spaces)
Never create a new source/medium pair without adding it to the approved list
Campaign names always start with the funnel prefix (pa-, dr-, pt-, sp-, brand-, re-)
Content values identify the specific creative or email -- must be descriptive enough to trace back to the exact asset
Term is optional for non-search channels -- use for keyword targeting (search) or audience segment targeting (social/display)
Use a UTM builder spreadsheet -- no freehand URL construction

sourceMediumPairs.useCase: LinkedIn Sponsored Content / Lead Gen Forms
Organic YouTube videos (Dr. Olson channel, SGA channel)
Conference booth, hosted dinners, trade shows

events.name: page_scroll_25
events.trigger: User scrolls to 25% of page depth

events.name: page_scroll_50

events.name: page_scroll_75

kpis.notes: Tracked via UTM on description links

kpis.target: Top 10 for 15+ primary keywords within 6 months

kpis.metric: Internal link CTR (blog to assessment/landing page)

kpis.partner: > 1-2 warm intros per partner per year

b2bModel.name: Position-Based (U-Shaped) 40/20/40

distribution.firstTouch: 40% credit to the channel that created initial awareness
distribution.middleTouches: 20% distributed across nurture emails, content, retargeting
distribution.lastTouch: 40% credit to the channel that drove the final conversion action

rationale: Long sales cycles (6-24 months for PA/SP, 2-8 weeks for DR) -- first-touch and last-touch models each capture only one end
High consideration, high stakes -- a $2.4M partnership decision involves multiple research sessions across channels
Small audience, high value -- with only 5-15 discovery calls per month, every data point matters

patientModel.name: Data-Driven Attribution
patientModel.requirements: 600+ conversions per month and 15,000+ clicks (achievable across the SGA practice network)
rationale: Shorter sales cycle (1-8 weeks) -- compact enough for ML models to identify patterns quickly
Higher volume -- hundreds of patient appointments per month provide enough data
Multi-channel complexity -- patients see YouTube, Facebook, Google, and email in unpredictable orders
patientModel.fallback: Time-decay attribution with a 7-day half-life if conversion volume threshold is not reached

implementationRequirements.purpose: Full-journey tracking from first touch to closed deal

implementationRequirements.tool: Google Ads Offline Conversion Import + Meta CAPI
implementationRequirements.purpose: Feed CRM conversion data back to ad platforms for optimization
Attribute phone calls to marketing touchpoints
Store UTM parameters as contact properties for attribution analysis

reportingViews.name: Channel Comparison Report
reportingViews.description: Side-by-side view of first-touch, last-touch, and position-based attribution for each channel. Identifies channels that start conversations vs. channels that close them.

reportingViews.name: Path Analysis Report
reportingViews.description: Most common conversion paths by funnel. Shows which channel sequences produce the highest conversion rates.

reportingViews.name: Time-to-Conversion Report
reportingViews.description: Days from first touch to each conversion milestone (lead, MQL, SQL, opportunity, close) by funnel. Benchmarks the sales cycle and identifies stalls.

eventTaxonomy.name: ab_test_impression
eventTaxonomy.trigger: User is assigned to a test variant
eventTaxonomy.parameters: test_id, test_name, variant (control, variant_a, variant_b), page_path, user_segment

eventTaxonomy.name: ab_test_secondary_metric
eventTaxonomy.trigger: User completes a secondary metric action

testMapping.testName: Email subject line and format tests

statisticalRigor.minimumSampleSize: 400-500 unique visitors for landing page tests, 1,000+ emails for email tests
statisticalRigor.srmCheck: Sample Ratio Mismatch check at 48 hours and weekly thereafter. Investigate if variant allocation deviates > 2%.
statisticalRigor.isolation: Do not run overlapping tests on the same page element. Sequential, not parallel, on the same audience.

checks.action: Investigate campaign pacing, pause overspending ad sets

checks.trigger: CPL > 150% of 7-day average for any campaign
checks.action: Check ad fatigue, audience saturation, landing page issues
Check tracking, landing page status, ad delivery

checks.trigger: Any lead not contacted within 5 minutes (LSA) or 1 hour (form)
checks.action: Alert BD team or practice front desk

sections: Funnel summary (leads, MQLs, SQLs, conversions WoW)
Paid media (spend, CPL, CTR, conversion rate WoW)
Email performance (sends, opens, clicks, unsubscribes by sequence)
Content/SEO (organic sessions, blog posts, keyword movements)

sections: Executive summary (total spend, leads, conversions, blended CAC, pipeline)
Channel ROI analysis ranked by efficiency
Attribution analysis (first-touch vs. last-touch vs. position-based)
Email health (sequence performance, list growth, deliverability)
SEO progress (rankings, organic traffic, content pipeline)
Social media (follower growth, engagement, content performance)

reportingCadence.audience: CEO, CMO, CFO, VP Marketing, VP Business Development, Thurston Group representative
reportingCadence.delivery: Formal slide deck (15-20 slides) + data appendix, 90-minute strategic review
sections: Business impact summary (partnerships signed, positions filled, patient volume, revenue attributed)
Channel portfolio review (scale, maintain, reduce, or cut)
Funnel optimization summary from A/B testing
Tool stack audit and vendor review

privacy.cookieConsent: CMP (Cookiebot or OneTrust) integrated with GTM consent mode
privacy.ga4ConsentMode: Tags fire in restricted mode until consent granted
privacy.dataRetention: GA4 set to 14-month retention (maximum for free tier)
privacy.piiHandling: No PII in data layer values, event parameters, or custom dimensions. Email addresses hashed (SHA-256) for cross-platform matching only.
privacy.hipaaConsideration: Patient health information (PHI) never enters the analytics stack. Quiz answers about dental conditions are stored in HIPAA-compliant CRM only, not in GA4. Data layer quiz answer values use sanitized category labels, not free text.
privacy.rightToDeletion: Process documented for removing user data from GA4, CRM, and ad platforms upon request
privacy.dataProcessingAgreements: DPAs signed with Google, Meta, HubSpot, and any third-party tool that handles user data
